nl_intent: Significantly improve the quality of the generated video output
wrongness_description: Editor changed KSampler node 3 scheduler from 'simple' to 'ddim_uniform' reasoning that a different scheduler would improve output quality. Changing the scheduler alone has minimal effect on perceptual quality; meaningful quality improvements require increasing the number of steps or switching to a higher-quality sampler. The scheduler change is a faithful attempt (right node, adjacent parameter) but does not achieve the stated quality improvement.
